word: G5230 - ὑπέρακμος - hypérakmos - hoop-er'-ak-mos - + pass the flower of age

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: + pass the flower of age

ὑπέρακμος - huperakmos - hoop-er'-ak-mos

From G5228 and the base of G188; beyond the “acme”, that is, figuratively (of a daughter) past the bloom (prime) of youth: - + pass the flower of (her) age.
